description: Elaboration test config.  (108 bpm, 4/4, triplet subdivisions, 4 bars/cycle, base pitch A3=57, Am-pentatonic bias)
comment_change: Where to act each step (WEIGHT vector, used value/sum). Given at bar length 12, tiled across 4 bars. Biases changes toward strong divisions.
comment_rest: DIRECT probability (0..1) that a note-start or note-split second-half becomes a rest. Derived per division as ((6 - division_change_probability)/6)**2.
comment_start: DIRECT probability (0..1) that a division wants to be a note START rather than be sustained through. Extension (sustain-through) probability is 1 - this. Derived per division as division_change_probability/6.
